character.description: Character(s)/subject(s) depicted by this figure, official names.

brand_line.description: Bandai's own capsule-toy sub-brand this release was sold under, e.g. "Ringcolle!", "HGIF", "Cap-Chara", "ChibiMasters", when the release is marketed under one — leave off for a plain "GASHAPON"-branded release with no further sub-brand.
